info.title: Fonoa API
info.description: Fonoa API for tax automation including tax ID validation (Lookup), tax rate calculation (Tax), e-invoicing, and company onboarding.

post.description: Validates a Tax Identification Number (TIN) by supplying a country ISO code and the client's tax identification number.

get.description: Retrieves the results of a previously submitted tax ID validation.

post.description: Submits a batch of tax ID validations for processing.

get.description: Retrieves the results of a previously submitted batch validation.

delete.description: Removes a batch validation and its results.

post.description: Cancels a batch validation that is currently in progress.
Calculates applicable taxes for a transaction based on provided details.

get.description: Retrieves a previously submitted tax calculation result.

put.description: Updates a previously submitted tax calculation.

post.description: Submits a transaction for digital reporting and e-invoicing compliance.

get.description: Retrieves a list of submitted transactions.
Retrieves a specific transaction by ID.

post.description: Creates a credit note for a transaction.
Registers a new company for tax compliance.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all onboarded companies.
Retrieves details of a specific onboarded company.

patch.description: Updates details of an onboarded company.

get.description: Get the status of an onboarding job.
